activity.subtitle: Recent Interactions

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.subtitle: Visibility Control
privacy.dataSharingDesc: Help us improve the AI by sharing anonymous usage patterns. Your identity remains 100% private.

security.title: Security & Access
security.subtitle: Identity & Protocols
security.googleDesc: Google Authentication implements a cryptographic layer for every sign-in attempt, utilizing Passkeys and secure hardware verification.
security.resetSent: Password reset link sent to your email.
security.sessionsRevoked: All other active sessions have been invalidated.
security.mfaDesc: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a verification code from your phone when you sign in.
security.phoneDesc: Your phone number is used for account recovery and 2FA security.
security.mfaConfirmation: We've sent a 6-digit code to {phone}. Enter it to proceed.

vibe.hustle: Focus on peak productivity. Get things done fast.
vibe.balance: Optimal mix of productivity and mental well-being.

ai.title: Pulse AI Intelligence
ai.subtitle: Logic Configuration
ai.frequencyDesc: Controls how often Pulse AI will intervene or offer suggestions throughout your day.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.subtitle: Account Persistence Control
dataManagement.exportDesc: Collect and download your entire Pulse data history in JSON format.
dataManagement.deleteDesc: Permanently remove your account and all associated data from Pulse servers.
dataManagement.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and irreversible.

tooltips.optimize: AI will schedule tasks based on your energy score and vibe mode.
tooltips.priority: The importance level of the task. Critical tasks appear at the top.
tooltips.deadline: Set an exact time to finish this task.
tooltips.recurrence: Make this task repeat automatically at specific intervals.
tooltips.status: Track the lifecycle progress of this task.
tooltips.project: Group this task into a larger project.
tooltips.duration: Estimated time needed to complete this task.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

journal.title: Self-Reflection
journal.subtitle: Connect your thoughts, find your patterns.
journal.peakPlaceholder: What was the highlight of your day?

energyCheck.title: Calibration Cycle
energyCheck.subtitle: Morning Check-in
energyCheck.desc: Align your energy and focus today. Tell Pulse your condition, and let AI determine the best work mode.
energyCheck.dailyProtocol: Today's Calibration Protocol is Locked & Optimized
energyCheck.strategyDesc: Based on your condition, Pulse AI suggests:

dashboard.calibrateAIPrompt: Calibrate your day to see AI insights.
dashboard.restPatternStable: Your rest pattern is stable. Continue this rhythm to avoid burnout.

help.system: Your personal AI engine is monitoring biometric markers to optimize your workflow in real-time.
help.sync: This index evaluates how your output correlates with your mental and physical wellness. Keeping these aligned prevents burnout.
help.energy: "Daily Calibration" is your daily energy alignment process. AI analyzes your mental and physical condition to provide recommendations for the most efficient activities so you don't tire easily.
help.flow: AI analysis of your daily energy. We adjust the order and priority of tasks based on your current focus and fatigue levels.
help.summarizer: This tool uses AI to transform long text into key points, executive summaries, and instant action lists.
help.fitness: This AI coach creates adaptive training programs. If your energy is low, intensity is automatically reduced to keep it safe and productive.
help.moodMap: This data is collected from your daily journal results and the emotions you shared during your morning calibration.
help.wellness: The Wellness Index is calculated from your average energy, focus, and sleep quality. We compare it with the number of completed tasks to find your optimal point.
